_note: Product-description table for the embedding matcher (product_discovery.py). Per-brand for tenant isolation. `palette` is [light_accent_rgb, dark_base_rgb]; `centrality` is how core the product is to the brand (tie-breaker). Descriptions are paraphrased from public fall/seasonal + core menus. Replace this file with a query against the real product DB; the matcher interface is unchanged.

Starbucks.name: Pumpkin Spice Latte
Starbucks.descriptors: espresso and steamed milk with real pumpkin, cinnamon, nutmeg and clove, topped with whipped cream and pumpkin pie spice, a cozy nostalgic autumn ritual in a takeaway cup

Starbucks.name: Pumpkin Cream Cold Brew
Starbucks.descriptors: smooth cold brew topped with pumpkin cream cold foam and a dusting of pumpkin spice, refreshing fall pick-me-up served over ice

Starbucks.name: Iced Apple Crisp Oatmilk Shaken Espresso
Starbucks.descriptors: blonde espresso with notes of apple, cinnamon and brown sugar, shaken and topped with oatmilk over ice, crisp autumn orchard flavor

Starbucks.name: Pecan Crunch Oatmilk Latte
Starbucks.descriptors: blonde espresso with oatmilk, notes of pecan, brown butter and baking spices, topped with pecan crunch, warm cozy autumn morning latte

Starbucks.name: Peppermint Mocha
Starbucks.descriptors: espresso with bittersweet chocolate mocha and cool peppermint, topped with whipped cream and dark chocolate curls, festive winter holiday classic

Starbucks.name: Caramel Brulee Latte
Starbucks.descriptors: espresso and steamed milk with rich caramel brulee sauce, topped with whipped cream and caramel brulee bits, indulgent festive winter treat

Starbucks.name: Caffe Latte
Starbucks.descriptors: rich full-bodied espresso with smooth steamed milk and a light layer of foam, the timeless everyday morning ritual

Starbucks.name: Caramel Macchiato
Starbucks.descriptors: freshly steamed milk with vanilla syrup, marked with espresso and finished with a caramel drizzle, sweet smooth everyday favorite

Starbucks.name: Cold Brew Coffee
Starbucks.descriptors: slow-steeped for 20 hours for a super-smooth, bold and naturally sweet flavor, served black over ice, refreshing afternoon coffee

Starbucks.name: Nitro Cold Brew
Starbucks.descriptors: cold brew infused with nitrogen for a cascading velvety body and naturally sweet finish, served unsweetened and iced, smooth bold afternoon refresher

Starbucks.name: Iced Brown Sugar Oatmilk Shaken Espresso
Starbucks.descriptors: blonde espresso shaken with brown sugar and cinnamon, topped with oatmilk over ice, trendy lightly sweet refreshing iced espresso

Starbucks.name: Matcha Green Tea Latte
Starbucks.descriptors: smooth and creamy matcha green tea sweetened and combined with steamed milk, earthy calming wellness drink

Starbucks.name: Chai Tea Latte
Starbucks.descriptors: black tea infused with cinnamon, clove and other warming spices combined with steamed milk, cozy comforting spiced tea latte

Starbucks.name: Strawberry Acai Refresher
Starbucks.descriptors: sweet strawberry flavors with real strawberry pieces and a splash of acai, shaken with ice for a bright light energizing summer refresher
